libraries.version_source: Version string found in file content: '4.2.67' (apiVersion check in getDocument call). Upgraded from 3.11.174 to remediate CVE-2024-4367 (arbitrary JS via crafted PDF font path). pdfjs-dist 4.x ships ESM only; file is legacy/build/pdf.min.mjs renamed to .js and loaded via an inline type=module shim in visualiser-core.html that exposes window.pdfjsLib.

File is legacy/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs renamed to .js; 4.x loads workers with { type: 'module' } so ESM content is valid. Same-origin chrome-extension:// URL means no blob CDN wrapper is created.
